description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a low boundary wall and featuring a spacious front yard with two parked cars. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and large windows, allowing for ample natural light inside. The front entrance is centrally located, leading to a paved walkway and a driveway. The backyard includes a green lawn and a mature tree, providing a private outdoor space. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with darker window frames and roof elements. The overall design emphasizes open space, simplicity, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and spacious front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two cars, and a large front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, backyard tree, and the boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard, tree, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, boundary wall, and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
